speak.title: Speak
speak.description: Set to true to play pre-built audio. Resets to false after playback.

voice.title: Voice
voice.description: Kokoro voice id (e.g. af_heart, af_bella, am_michael).

device.title: Device
device.description: auto: WebGPU if available, else WASM; tries WASM if WebGPU init fails. Or force wasm / webgpu.
